_comment: Public-domain / well-known short YouTube clips used by the Luna Learn end-to-end integration test (T6.2). The default fixture is intentionally short (≤90s) so the real transcription pipeline can finish in CI's per-test timeout without burning compute. If a URL goes 404 / private, swap in another known-stable public clip. The integration test is `@pytest.mark.slow` and skipped by default — only contributors who opt in (`pytest -m slow`) hit YouTube.

default.title: Big Buck Bunny — short public-domain clip

alternates.title: Big Buck Bunny — official Blender Open Movie
alternates.note: Longer — use only if default fixture is unavailable; raise LUNA_LEARN_MAX_DURATION_S accordingly.
